title: Historical Background and Naming
paragraphs: Nepalgunj city is located in the Banke district and is recognized as the Gateway of West Nepal, an established city named after the country itself. The current Nepalgunj Sub-Metropolitan City was named after this historic city. Another notable feature of this region is that it lies 10 kilometers south of the East-West Highway and is connected to the Nepal-India border. Located near the Rupaidiha border with India, this city is considered important due to trade relations between the two countries.
